title: lens culinaris subsp. orientalis
intro: Lens culinaris subsp. orientalis, commonly known as yellow lentil or brown lentil, is a type of lentil that belongs to the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lens culinaris subsp. orientalis include reducing the risk of heart disease, managing blood sugar levels, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine and culinary practices.
